statement: In every magma, Equation 2386 (`x = (y * (z * (y * y))) * y`) implies Equation 3226 (`x = (((y * z) * z) * w) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0202
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op y y))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) z) w) u)
